required_files.rationale: Contains wsgi_app/full_dispatch_request where open_session is called before URL matching sets endpoint

sufficient_files.rationale: Request wrapper where endpoint attribute is defined

error_chain: Flask creates request context and pushes it
open_session() is called during request context push
URL matching (which sets request.endpoint) happens AFTER session is opened
Therefore request.endpoint is None inside open_session
trigger_conditions: open_session is called during request context push in app.py
URL rule matching happens later in full_dispatch_request
Endpoint is not available until after URL dispatch
